response.justification: Bogdan is a highly skilled Staff Engineer with an impressive open-source portfolio and deep technical expertise. However, he falls short of the Head of Development requirements due to a lack of executive-level leadership and formal team management experience. Most critically, his basic German proficiency does not meet the strict C1 minimum required to effectively advise clients in this consulting role.
strengths: Extensive experience designing and developing modern software systems and open-source platforms.
Strong background in Linux environments and diverse tech stacks including Node.js, TypeScript, and DLang.
Proven track record of mentoring and knowledge sharing through workshops, talks, and coding dojos.
concerns: Basic German language skills do not meet the strict C1 minimum requirement for client communication.
Lacks formal executive-level leadership and dedicated team management experience.
No explicit experience with UML modeling, IT security compliance, or enterprise requirements management.
